---
title: "Week 12: R Workbook & CITI Certification"
subtitle: "No New Chapter — Skills Practice Week"
date: "2026-04-07"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
---

## Overview

This is a remote work week with no new chapter reading. You have two tasks: work through the R Workbook to build your data analysis skills, and complete your CITI ethics certification. Both prepare you for the final stretch of the semester.

## R Workbook

Download the workbook using coursepackR:

```r
library(coursepackR)
download_workbook()
```

The workbook covers six sections aligned with the analysis and publishing chapters (Chapters 17–22):

1. **Wrangling** — Pipes, dplyr verbs, data cleaning
2. **Describing** — Frequency tables, ggplot2 visualization
3. **Testing** — t-tests, chi-square, correlation, effect sizes
4. **Interpreting** — Plain-English translation of statistical output
5. **Portfolio** — Quarto rendering and document structure
6. **Publishing** — Git, GitHub, GitHub Pages deployment

Work through each section interactively in RStudio. Watch the corresponding instructor videos linked in the workbook.

## Assignment: CITI Ethics Certification (50 pts)

### Task

Complete the CITI Program's *Social & Behavioral Research* training:

1. Go to [citiprogram.org](https://www.citiprogram.org)
2. Register with your SIUE email
3. Select the **Social & Behavioral Research** course
4. Complete all required modules
5. Submit your completion certificate as a PDF to Blackboard

This certification is required for conducting human subjects research and demonstrates your understanding of the ethical principles covered in Chapter 8.
